components.title: Carousel Hero
components.description: A rotating hero carousel with product badge images, eyebrow text, headlines, and CTAs. Used on the homepage.

components.title: Hero
components.description: Full-width hero banner with background image, heading, description, and optional CTA.

components.title: Cards News
components.description: Text-only news article cards with category label, heading, description, and CTA link.

components.description: Icon and label utility link tiles for quick navigation (Downloads, Support, etc.).

components.title: Cards Product
components.description: Product showcase cards with image, heading link, description, and CTA. For dark sections.

components.title: Cards Resource
components.description: Simple title-link resource cards in a grid. For dark sections.

components.title: Columns
components.description: Side-by-side content layout with text and images. Supports alternating patterns.

components.title: Retailer Locator
components.description: Placeholder for retailer/shop dropdown functionality. Black background with white text.

components.title: Social Feed
components.description: Placeholder for social media feed integration.
